svg.text: 3 surfaces — single-page Bayar checkout · Bahasa picker · Perlu Perhatian inbox (Lihat Semua)

g.text: Buka GoPay / OVO / Dana / m-banking → Scan
Notifikasi lunas otomatis dikirim ke admin sekolah.
Aplikasi akan refresh setelah ganti bahasa
Data login + tab aktif tetap dipertahankan
A simpler single-page Bayar checkout (vs the previous 4-step Phase-5 mockup), brand-aligned bahasa picker, and a unified Perlu-Perhatian inbox surface.
• Method tabs: QRIS · Virtual Account · Manual
• Per-tab inline content (no separate detail screen)
• Sticky "Saya sudah bayar — Cek status" CTA
• Footnote: notif lunas dikirim ke admin
verifikasi admin" timeline ends at step 2
• Drag handle + close X + title block
• 2 tiles (ID active / EN) with flag, native + intl
• Amber info box: "App akan refresh setelah ganti
bahasa · login + tab aktif tetap dipertahankan"
— no backend change, only widget swap.
• Brand-azure hero with counter chip + Tandai semua
• Filter chips horizontal scroll: Semua · Tagihan ·
• Items grouped by date (HARI INI / KEMARIN /
• Each row: icon + title + subtitle + meta + dot
• Tap → opens that item's existing detail sheet
groups by `data['type']`, sorts by created_at desc.
